title: Itchy Armpits: Causes, Fixes & When to Worry
meta_description: Itchy armpits driving you crazy? Learn the most common causes — from deodorant irritation to dry skin — and find out exactly how to stop the itch for good.
image_prompt: Lifestyle photography, a bright modern bathroom vanity scene communicating armpit irritation and soothing skincare relief, with a person's forearm and hand gently touching the inside of their opposite upper arm near the underarm area over a soft white fitted short-sleeve shirt, suggesting discomfort or soothing — no bare skin beyond the forearm and hand visible, shoulders and underarm area fully covered by the shirt, a small white cylindrical rollerball deodorant bottle with a flat white snap-on cap (Calming Lavender variant, label visible) resting on the white quartz countertop beside a folded white hand towel and a small white ceramic dish, white subway tile wall softly blurred in the background, warm diffused morning light from a frosted window to the left, photorealistic, 35mm lens, shot on Canon R5, wide landscape crop filling the full frame edge to edge, no letterboxing, no borders.
